title: Entity Spectate
description: This is a simple Fabric mod that allows you to shift-right-click any entity (besides items) to spectate it on the client-side.
body:
**⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**

This mod requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
<hr>

**Mod Description**

This is a simple client-sided Fabric mod that allows you to spectate entities when pressing **SHIFT** + **RMB** (Right Mouse Button), when looking at one (you must keep holding **SHIFT** once you start to spectate, to keep spectating. To stop spectating, just release the key). For a visual of the mod, click the **Mod Demonstration Video** below, or view this mod's **Gallery Tab**.

**⚠️IMPORTANT NOTE⚠️:** When you spectate an entity, you can hit other entities it looks at if they are within a 6-block distance from you. This can lead to suspicious interactions on servers, so be cautious (or ask your admin for permission). Also, you won't be able to see yourself while spectating, and hitting yourself will result in a 'Attempting To Attack An Invalid Entity' error, causing the game to kick you.
<hr>

**Mod Demonstration Video**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/5Lig_gzknFA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
